sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Vertex Presents New Data on CASGEVY®, Including First-Ever Data in Children Ages 5-11 Years, at the American Society of Hematology Annual Meeting and Announces Plan for Global Regulatory Submissions
feed.summary: Vertex (Nasdaq: VRTX) has unveiled new data at the American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting for CASGEVY®, its gene therapy, including the first clinical data for children aged 5-11 years with severe sickle cell disease (SCD) or transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia (TDT). The data demonstrate strong efficacy and safety consistent with older patient cohorts, showing high rates where patients either achieved freedom from vaso-occlusive crises or transfusion independence. Vertex plans to initiate global regulatory submissions for CASGEVY in this younger age group in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Why NetApp (NTAP) Is Up 5.1% After Deepening AWS AI Integration With ONTAP Data Access
feed.summary: NetApp recently integrated Amazon S3 Access Points for Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP, enabling AWS AI and analytics services to access NetApp-managed data without relocation, maintaining full file protocol access and cyber-resilience. This enhanced integration aims to position NetApp at the core of AI and analytics workflows, boosting its hybrid cloud and subscription offerings. The company reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 guidance, expecting US$6.625 billion to US$6.875 billion in revenue and 23.5% to 24.5% operating margins.

feed.title: Target Acquires Transportation Tech Company
feed.summary: Target Corporation announced the acquisition of Grand Junction, a San Francisco-based transportation technology company.
